gate_checks.FLOW-34_annotation_deferred: FLOW-34-REFERENCE-PLAN.md does not exist yet — annotation text recorded below for when FLOW-34 is planned

deferred_annotations.FLOW-34_phase_A: Feature-Manifest Integration (added FEATURE-REGISTRY-S1): Before generating any platform adapter, Phase A reads the source platform's feature-manifest-{platform}-v{N}.json from contracts/features/. It extracts the FT-IDs of features to be ported and passes them to the PortingCostEstimator (FLOW-36 T-XXX). The PortingDecisionGate (FLOW-36 T-XXX) must emit FeaturePortingApproved before any adapter code is generated. The adapter output is written back to the FT record's platforms[] array with status: 'implemented' and the adapter path. FLOW-34 does NOT assign new FT-IDs — it only attaches adapters to existing FT records.
